channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Junior Bridgeman, businessman and basketball standout for Louisville and Milwaukee Bucks, dies at 71
item.description: Junior Bridgeman, a basketball standout who went on to an even more successful career in business, has died at the age of 71.
item.dc:creator: Bruce Schreiner, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Tiger Woods says he ruptured his Achilles tendon, an injury that will keep him out of the Masters
item.description: PONTE VEDRA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Tiger Woods had a less invasive surgery for a ruptured Achilles tendon on Tuesday, which will keep him out of the Masters and leaves in question whether he can play in any other major championship the rest of the year.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Injured Brad Marchand returns to the Boston ice with the Panthers
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Brad Marchand stepped back onto the ice at the TD Garden on Tuesday — this time in a Panthers practice jersey as the longtime Bruins player returned to Boston for the first time since he was traded to Florida.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Tiger Woods says he had surgery after rupturing his Achilles tendon, an injury likely to keep him out of the Masters
item.description: The Masters is April 10-13. Woods set the Masters record last year by making the cut for the 24th time in a row.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Eagles send Gardner-Johnson to Texans. Vikings bolster offensive, defensive lines in NFL free agency
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles' top-ranked defense is getting a major makeover a month after ending Patrick Mahomes' bid to lead the Kansas City Chiefs to a third consecutive Super Bowl title.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Big Ten COO Kerry Kenny on West Coast schools: The ‘Big Noon’ issue, travel logistics, officiating and more
item.description: Kenny addressed a number of topics, including officiating and the TV schedule, during a Q&A about UCLA, USC, Oregon and Washington.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Warriors' Steph Curry becomes investor in Unrivaled Basketball
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- Stephen Curry has joined Unrivaled basketball as an investor. The Golden State Warriors guard is the latest sports star to join the 3v3 basketball league as an investor, joining the likes of the NBA's Giannis Antetokounmpo and Carmelo Anthony, and tennis star Coco Gauff.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Vikings focus up front in free agency by reaching deals with DT Jonathan Allen, G Will Fries
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The Minnesota Vikings continued an aggressive reconstruction of the interior lines on Tuesday by agreeing to terms on contracts with former Washington defensive tackle Jonathan Allen and former Indianapolis guard Will Fries, who followed center Ryan Kelly from the Colts to the Vik
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Several once-highly ranked teams enter conference tournament week in need of wins to make NCAA field
item.description: LAWRENCE, Kan. (AP) — This was a time early in the season when Kansas seemed to be an insurmountable juggernaut, full of high-profile transfers such as Zeke Mayo and AJ Storr, All-American candidates such as Hunter Dickinson and veterans accustomed to winning. They were the preseason No.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Meet Formula 1's biggest rookie intake in years. Some already are targeting the podium
item.description: Andrea Kimi Antonelli once hid in a stack of tires to get through security and into the Formula 1 paddock. Now the 18-year-old Italian is Lewis Hamilton's successor at Mercedes. Antonelli is among F1's biggest intake of new drivers in years as top teams put some trust in youth.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles 'enthusiastically accepted' President Trump's White House invite after Super Bowl win, official says
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles have "enthusiastically accepted" President Trump's White House invite to celebrate the team's Super Bowl LIX victory.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gerrit Cole will miss 2025 MLB season as Yankees announce ace will undergo Tommy John surgery
item.description: The New York Yankees' worst fears came true, as they announced Gerrit Cole will undergo Tommy John surgery on Tuesday to repair a torn UCL, rendering him out for the entire 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bills reward Allen with new contract after NFL MVP season. Deal is worth $330M, AP source says
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — NFL MVP Josh Allen was rewarded Sunday with a contract extension worth $330 million, including an NFL record $250 million of it guaranteed, which makes him among the league’s highest-paid players.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Cavaliers rely on scoring balance to beat Bucks 112-100 for 14th consecutive victory
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Max Strus had 17 points to lead a balanced scoring attack as the NBA-leading Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Milwaukee Bucks 112-100 on Sunday night for their 14th consecutive victory.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: George, Filipowski score 25 in Jazz loss to Sixers
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George and Kyle Filipowski each scored 25 points, but the Utah Jazz dropped its fifth straight game, losing at Philadelphia Sunday night, 126-122. Lonnie Walker IV and Quentin Grimes scored 25 points apiece for the victories 76ers.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Soccer CIF Division IV SoCal State Regional Championship: Pacific Ridge 3, Central Union 2
item.description: The CIF Division IV Boys Soccer SoCal Regional State Championship featured two San Diego Section teams, as the Pacific Ridge Firebirds hosted the Central Union Spartans.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Bowling Green hires former NFL star running back Eddie George as coach
item.description: Bowling Green hired former NFL running back and Tennessee State coach Eddie George on Sunday as the Falcons' head coach.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Texas district attorney declines to pursue charges against Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver Xavier Worthy
item.description: Xavier Worthy was arrested Friday and has since been released after the county's district attorney said he would not accept the case at this time.
item.dc:creator: Olivia Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Tatum scores 40, Celtics beat Lakers 111-101 after James leaves late with groin injury
item.description: Jayson Tatum had 40 points, 12 rebounds, and eight assists, and the Boston Celtics held off a late rally to beat the Los Angeles Lakers 111-101 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Daytona 500 winner William Byron claims NASCAR Cup pole
item.description: On Saturday, Daytona 500 winner William Byron claimed the Busch Light pole during the 312-mile race at Phoenix Raceway. According to NASCAR, it's the 14th pole of the 27 year-old's career.
item.dc:creator: Russell Falcon, Fox 5

item.title: Chiefs WR Xavier Worthy released after prosecutor declines charges
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Xavier Worthy was released Saturday after a district attorney in Texas declined to pursue charges against the Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver following an arrest in which he had been accused of felony domestic violence.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Kessler pulls down 25 rebounds in Jazz loss at Toronto
item.description: TORONTO (ABC4 Sports) - Walker Kessler set a career high with 25 rebounds, to go along with a team-high 18 points and a career-high eight blocks, but it wasn't enough to prevent another loss by the Utah Jazz, who fell at Toronto Friday night, 118-101.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Volleyball: The Bishop's School 3, La Jolla 1
item.description: Boys Volleyball matchup is the battle of Pearl street between The Bishop's school Knights and La Jolla Vikings.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Donovan Mitchell scores 28 and NBA-best Cavs beat Bulls 139-117 for 11th straight win
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored 28 points, Jarrett Allen added 25 points and 17 rebounds, and the NBA-best Cleveland Cavaliers won their 11th straight game, 139-117 over the Chicago Bulls on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
